segment.source: An interactive image gallery showing one large featured image above a row of clickable thumbnails, with lightbox zoom on the main image. Use it on portfolio, product, or event pages to let visitors browse a set of visuals while keeping one motif prominent. Key fields are the heading and sub-headline, a 2-, 3-, or 4-column thumbnail setting, and a collection of items each with an image, title, description, and optional link.
